roman_heading_candidates.text: I. In the first I shall consider, — 1. What are the things that are shaken; 2. What is their shaking; 3. What their removal, being shaken.
III. The last head remaineth under two particulars: — 1. What are "the things that cannot be shaken?" 2. What is their remaining?
I. In the first I shall consider two things: — 1. The person dismissed: "Thou;" 2. The dismission itself: "Go thou thy ways."
II. As to the first of these, we may observe, —
II. The providential accidents spoken of are two, and of two sorts.
